---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

# I first want to parse the chromhmm states and save them into their own files
```{r}

library(rtracklayer)

chromhmm_gr = import.bed(con = './chromHmm_k562/chromhmm_k562_hg38_ENCFF963KIA.bed', genome = "hg38")

chromhmm_unique_names = unique(chromhmm_gr$name)

for (name_choice in chromhmm_unique_names) {
  
  keep = chromhmm_gr$name == name_choice
  
  chromhmm_kept = chromhmm_gr[keep]
  
  fixed_name = gsub("/", "-", name_choice)
  
  out_filename = paste(fixed_name, "chromhmm_hg38_ENCFF963KIA.bed", sep = "_")
  
  export.bed(object = chromhmm_kept, con = paste0("./chromHmm_k562/", out_filename))
}


```
